'''ngozhagaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:weaponized|weaponized]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-zh-g
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:weaponized|weaponized]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| ngozhagaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngozhagithi|ngozhagithi]] || [[word:ngozhagiji|ngozhagiji]] || [[word:ngozhagishi|ngozhagishi]] || [[word:ngozhagiki|ngozhagiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngozhaguthuthu|ngozhaguthuthu]] || [[word:ngozhagujuju|ngozhagujuju]] || [[word:ngozhagushushu|ngozhagushushu]] || [[word:ngozhagukuku|ngozhagukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngozhaguthu|ngozhaguthu]] || [[word:ngozhaguju|ngozhaguju]] || [[word:ngozhagushu|ngozhagushu]] || [[word:ngozhaguku|ngozhaguku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngozhagufthuf|ngozhagufthuf]] || [[word:ngozhagufjuf|ngozhagufjuf]] || [[word:ngozhagufshuf|ngozhagufshuf]] || [[word:ngozhagufkuf|ngozhagufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngozhagethe|ngozhagethe]] || [[word:ngozhageje|ngozhageje]] || [[word:ngozhageshe|ngozhageshe]] || [[word:ngozhageke|ngozhageke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngozhagothotho|ngozhagothotho]] || [[word:ngozhagojojo|ngozhagojojo]] || [[word:ngozhagoshosho|ngozhagoshosho]] || [[word:ngozhagokoko|ngozhagokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngozhagotho|ngozhagotho]] || [[word:ngozhagojo|ngozhagojo]] || [[word:ngozhagosho|ngozhagosho]] || [[word:ngozhagoko|ngozhagoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngozhagofthof|ngozhagofthof]] || [[word:ngozhagofjof|ngozhagofjof]] || [[word:ngozhagofshof|ngozhagofshof]] || [[word:ngozhagofkof|ngozhagofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfthĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfjĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfshĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfkĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfthĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfjĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfshĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfkĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfthĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfjĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfshĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŻfkĂŻf|ngozhagĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŠthĂŠ|ngozhagĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŠjĂŠ|ngozhagĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŠshĂŠ|ngozhagĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:ngozhagĂŠkĂŠ|ngozhagĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:ngozhagathatha|ngozhagathatha]] || [[word:ngozhagajaja|ngozhagajaja]] || [[word:ngozhagashasha|ngozhagashasha]] || [[word:ngozhagakaka|ngozhagakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:ngozhagatha|ngozhagatha]] || [[word:ngozhagaja|ngozhagaja]] || [[word:ngozhagasha|ngozhagasha]] || [[word:ngozhagaka|ngozhagaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:ngozhagafthaf|ngozhagafthaf]] || [[word:ngozhagafjaf|ngozhagafjaf]] || [[word:ngozhagafshaf|ngozhagafshaf]] || [[word:ngozhagafkaf|ngozhagafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:ngozhagasha|ngozhagasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngozhagshĂ«sha|ngozhagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngozhagrosha|ngozhagrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngozhagmusha|ngozhagmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngozhagyasha|ngozhagyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongozhagnkshĂ«sha|gongozhagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongozhagnkrosha|gongozhagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongozhagnkmusha|gongozhagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongozhagnkyasha|gongozhagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:ngozhazhagasha|ngozhazhagasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngozhazhagshĂ«sha|ngozhazhagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngozhazhagrosha|ngozhazhagrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngozhazhagmusha|ngozhazhagmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngozhazhagyasha|ngozhazhagyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongozhazhagnkshĂ«sha|gongozhazhagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongozhazhagnkrosha|gongozhazhagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongozhazhagnkmusha|gongozhazhagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongozhazhagnkyasha|gongozhazhagnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:ngezhĂŠgasha|ngezhĂŠgasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngezhĂŠgshĂ«sha|ngezhĂŠgshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngezhĂŠgrosha|ngezhĂŠgrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngezhĂŠgmusha|ngezhĂŠgmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngezhĂŠgyasha|ngezhĂŠgyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongezhĂŠgnkshĂ«sha|gongezhĂŠgnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongezhĂŠgnkrosha|gongezhĂŠgnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongezhĂŠgnkmusha|gongezhĂŠgnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongezhĂŠgnkyasha|gongezhĂŠgnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:ngozhfagasha|ngozhfagasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:ngozhfagshĂ«sha|ngozhfagshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:ngozhfagrosha|ngozhfagrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:ngozhfagmusha|ngozhfagmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:ngozhfagyasha|ngozhfagyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gongozhfagnkshĂ«sha|gongozhfagnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gongozhfagnkrosha|gongozhfagnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gongozhfagnkmusha|gongozhfagnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gongozhfagnkyasha|gongozhfagnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

{{wordpage|5390c6a}}
